2019-T4-P3-S1.trunk: S+V+O：The cases … said that …（被法院推翻的那些判例曾认定…）
structure: ├ 定语从句〔省略关系词，修饰 The cases〕：the court overturned
└ 宾语从句(that)：if a business was shipping …, the business didn't have to collect sales tax for the state
├ 条件状语从句(if)：if a business was shipping a customer's purchase to a state where the business didn't have a physical presence …
│   └ 定语从句〔where，修饰 a state〕：where the business didn't have a physical presence such as a warehouse or office
└ 主句（宾语从句内）：the business didn't have to collect sales tax for the state
2019-T4-P3-S1.logic: 主语 The cases（(that) the court overturned 定语从句修饰）；said that…（宾语从句）；宾语从句内含 if 条件从句（where 定语从句修饰 a state）+ 主句。
notes: The cases (that) the court overturned：cases 后省略关系词的定语从句（法院推翻的那些判例）。
said that…：宾语从句，内部又含 if 条件从句 + 主句（didn't have to collect tax）。
a state where…：where 定语从句修饰 a state（企业在该州无实体存在）。

2019-T4-P1-S1.trunk: S+V+O(force sb to do)：States will be able to force more people to pay sales tax …（各州将能迫使更多人缴销售税）
structure: 主句：States will be able to force more people to pay sales tax when they make online purchases under a Supreme Court decision Thursday …
├ force sb to do：force more people to pay sales tax
├ 时间状语从句(when)：when they make online purchases
├ 状语(under)：under a Supreme Court decision Thursday
└ 定语从句〔that，修饰 decision〕：that will leave shoppers with lighter wallets but is a big financial win for states（并列谓语 leave / is）
2019-T4-P1-S1.logic: 主句 force sb to do（迫使更多人缴税）；when… 时间状语；under… 状语（依据…裁决）；that 定语从句修饰 decision（并列谓语 leave… but is…）。
notes: force sb to do：迫使某人做…。
when they make online purchases：when 时间状语从句。
that will leave… but is…：that 定语从句修饰 decision，含并列谓语（leave shoppers with lighter wallets 让购物者钱包更瘪 / 对各州是财政利好）。

2019-T4-P6-S1.trunk: S+V：many sellers … have been able to avoid charging sales taxes（迄今许多卖家得以避免征收销售税）
structure: 主句：many sellers … have been able to avoid charging sales taxes when they ship to addresses outside those states
├ 定语从句〔that，修饰 sellers〕：that have a physical presence in only a single state or a few states
└ 时间状语从句(when)：when they ship to addresses outside those states
2019-T4-P6-S1.logic: 主语 sellers（that 定语从句修饰，造成主谓分隔），谓语 have been able to avoid charging…；when… 时间状语。
notes: 主谓分隔：主语 many sellers 与谓语 have been able 被 that 定语从句隔开。
avoid charging sales taxes：avoid + 动名词（避免征税）。
when they ship to addresses outside those states：when 时间状语从句。
